_meta.source: INE Spain — Encuesta de Estructura Salarial 2022 (Spain Earnings Structure Survey)
_meta.methodology: Spain earnings structure survey aligned with EU SES. Covers enterprises 10+ employees. Reports gross annual earnings by occupation (CNO-11 codes), region (comunidad autónoma), enterprise size. Published every 4 years. Updated to 2024 via Eurostat earn_gr_nwcob for Spain (+11.1% cumulative 2022-2024). INE EES every 4 years; next release expected 2026.
_meta.coverage: Spain national. Madrid from Comunidad de Madrid regional data. Barcelona from Cataluña regional data.
_meta.limitations: CNO-11 occupation codes are broad. Seniority not directly available in published aggregates — inferred from earnings distribution percentiles. Data updated to 2024. Spain has seen some tech salary growth since.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Desarrolladores y analistas de software, Spain national junior
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Entry-level software developers and analysts, Spain national. P25 band. Spain has significantly lower tech salaries than northern EU peers.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Desarrolladores y analistas de software, Spain national mid
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Mid-level software developers, Spain national median. Consistent with Eurostat SES 2024 Spain data.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Software developers, Spain national senior
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Senior software developers Spain. Upper quartile and above. Includes senior engineers at multinationals.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Software developers, Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid)
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid) regional data. Madrid is approximately 12% above Spain national median for tech roles.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Software developers, Barcelona (Cataluña)
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia
records.notes: Barcelona (Cataluña) regional data. Barcelona slightly below Madrid but above Spain national average for tech roles.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 242 — Profesionales de ventas y marketing, Spain
records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing
records.notes: Business organization and marketing professionals, Spain. Maps to marketing-manager, sales-manager, operations-manager roles.
